message: Command `python /nc/agent_tools/ipm_linker/ipm_linker.py --help 2>&1 | head -40` executed with exit code 0.
content:
usage: ipm_linker.py [-h] [-f FILE] [--project-root PROJECT_ROOT]
                     [--local-file LOCAL_VERIFIED_IPS_FILE]
                     [--ipm-root IPM_ROOT] [--continue-on-error] [--dry-run]
                     [--verbose]

Install/link IP dependencies from link_IPs.json using IPM.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  -f FILE, --file FILE  Path to link_IPs.json file (default: link_IPs.json)
  --project-root PROJECT_ROOT
                        IP installation path -- must be inputed by the user
                        (default: None)
  --local-file LOCAL_VERIFIED_IPS_FILE
                        Path to local verified IPs JSON file (default:
                        /nc/ip/verified_IPs.json) (default:
                        /nc/ip/verified_IPs.json)
  --ipm-root IPM_ROOT   IPM root path (default: /nc/ip) (default: /nc/ip)
  --continue-on-error   Continue processing other IPs even if one install
                        fails (default: False)
  --dry-run             Show the ipm commands without executing (default:
                        False)
  --verbose, -v         Verbose output (echo ipm stdout/stderr) (default:
                        False)
